case_title: MOLEX LEELA VS ISCHOFF MARVIN AND ESTATE OF ARGONAUT JEWELRY AND et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLEX LEELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SECURITY ARGONAUT INC. ESTATE ARGONAUT JEWELRY & LOAN CONRAD DANIEL A. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN. HEARD BY JUDGE MORGAN IN DEPT. 4 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MOLEX LEELA AS TO DEFENDANT ISCHOFF MARVIN AND ESTATE OF ARGONAUT JEWELRY AND LOAN COMPANY INC. A CORPORATION SECURITY ARGONAUT INC. ESTATE ARGONAUT JEWELRY & LOAN CONRAD DANIEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
